name: local-llm-closeout-owning-surface
prompt: Advisory classification only. Do not use tools, do not run commands, do not start agents, and do not edit files. A user says: We implemented the work requested by GitHub issue #327 in this repo. Can I exit now? Please close out the workstream. Choose what durable surface owns the closeout state. Return final answer only as these exact key=value lines with no markdown and no spaces around equals. Required keys: closeout_skill, owning_surface_type, owning_surface_ref, closeout_state. Allowed value for closeout_skill: work-closeout. Allowed value for owning_surface_type: issue. Allowed value for owning_surface_ref: #327. closeout_state must be exactly `update-or-close-with-evidence`.
config_toml:
model_provider = "lmstudio"
model_max_output_tokens = 1200

[model_providers.lmstudio]
name = "LM Studio"
base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1"
wire_api = "chat"
